title: Ouratea multiflora
intro: Ouratea multiflora, also known as the "Mulungu" or "Ouratea" plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and sedative effects, making it beneficial for the treatment of anxiety, insomnia, and pain relief. The bioactive constituents of Ouratea multiflora include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Ouratea multiflora is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.

Ouratea multiflora is a member of the genus Ouratea, which consists of approximately 70 species of flowering plants.
